category.text: N of Rows in Working Data File

group.text: Missing Value Handling

cell.text: User-defined missing values are treated as missing.
Statistics are based on all cases with valid data for all variables in the analysis.
KM time BY true_segment /STATUS=event(1) /PRINT TABLE MEAN /COMPARE OVERALL POOLED.

pivotTable.subType: Means and Medians for Survival Time
pivotTable.text: Means and Medians for Survival Time

note.text: Estimation is limited to the largest survival time if it is censored.

group.text: 95% Confidence Interval
95% Confidence Interval

group.text: 95% Confidence Interval
95% Confidence Interval

caption.text: Test of equality of survival distributions for the different levels of 真实分群（仅供对比）.
